sourceRefs: DRAFT — the curriculum's capstone unit: utopias and happiness. The lexicon of better worlds (utopie/dystopie, altermondialisme, microcrédit, coopérative, bien commun), comparing social-organisation projects on three axes (travail, propriété, décision — plus the dissent test), and the structured personal reflection (définir → confronter → illustrer → trancher puis ouvrir) that converges all prior C-level training. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 12 'Utopies ?' (utopies économiques et sociales, nouvelles solidarités, le bonheur; Auroville, altermondialisme, microcrédit; 'élaborer une réflexion personnelle sur la notion de bonheur'). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
